title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by industry
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Published industry medians (n≥10) are Banking & Capital Markets n=43 at S$85,000; Consumer Products n=43 at S$99,000; Government & Public Services n=18 at S$72,075; Health Care n=10 at S$71,000; Investment Management n=11 at S$91,545; Retail, Wholesale & Distribution n=11 at S$125,600; and Transportation, Hospitality & Services n=20 at S$90,000. Life Sciences (n=4) is suppressed, along with all other industries below n=10 and unspecified industry responses. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Industry cohorts below n=10, and unspecified/undisclosed industry responses, are not published individually. Values are self-reported total compensation medians, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
